name: Play-Doh Jewel Colors Bulk 12-Pack of 4-Ounce Cans, Holiday Stocking Stuffers, Prizes & Party Favors, Kids Arts & Crafts, Preschool Toys, Ages 2+ (Amazon Exclusive), 1 Kg
bullets: WINTER WONDERS: This festive winter Play-Doh collection is ready for winter holiday-themed arts and crafts for kids. Let their creativity shine with 9 beautiful colors

BULK PLAY-DOH CANS: This Play-Doh 12-pack includes large Play-Doh cans with 4 ounces in each can, including orange, purple, light green, blue, black, light blue, 2 cans of white, 2 cans of forest green, and 2 cans of red. Contains wheat
CREATIVE TOYS FOR KIDS: Boys and girls 2 years and up can create colorful trees, silly Play-Doh treats, adorable snowmen, and more winter-themed creations with this Play-Doh bulk set

FUN GIFT FOR KIDS: Play-Doh 4 oz sets make great holiday gifts for kids who love art supplies like modeling clay. Also makes a great playdate activity, classroom activity, or refill set for Play-Doh playsets
SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING: Ships in simple, recyclable packaging that'​​​​​​​s easy to open and frustration free
description: Celebrate the winter holiday season with this bulk Play-Doh 12-pack featuring 4-ounce cans in 12 bright and festive colors! Whether you're creating Play-Doh presents, snowflakes, or mittens, these large Play-Doh cans are great for kids 2 and up to share. They're also good as a Play-Doh refill to add to your color collection at home, as stocking stuffers, or to use with Play-Doh playsets and tools (sold separately). These colors are non-toxic and ready to use for fun arts and crafts activities at a party or play date. Whenever you've got a fun project that calls for art supplies like modeling c

reviews.name: Anne L
reviews.title: Fun and great quality for kids
reviews.body: This Play-Doh pastel set has been a big hit. The colors are really pretty and a nice change from the standard bright shades—it makes playtime feel a little more creative and unique.What I Loved: • Soft, easy-to-mold texture right out of the container • Pastel colors are fun and different from typical sets • Comes with plenty of containers—great for sharing or classrooms • Stays fresh when sealed…

reviews.name: C. Park
reviews.title: Fresh, Fun, and Worth It
reviews.body: Bought this for my kids (5 and 7) and it’s been a solid purchase. The jewel tone colors are bright and fun, and every tub came fresh and soft. Each 4oz can is a good size—plenty to build with without feeling wasteful if some gets left out.The packaging is sturdy, the lids snap on tight, and the dough has stayed fresh between uses. Cleanup is about as easy as Play-Doh gets—it doesn’t stick badly…

reviews.name: Jonathan Germano
reviews.title: Great play doh product!
reviews.body: Love these and my nieces do to. Great value for the pack. Multiple colors, did get 2 green and 2 pink. Lots of fun and as advertised.

reviews.name: Kim
reviews.title: Great birthday gift.
reviews.body: Itsssss playdoh! Love that you can get the larger full sized cups. Lots of the minis or other bulk ones come with so much extra plastic cutters, molds, ect. This just keeps it simple with the big cups. Comes packaged in a white hasbro box.
